name: SCC_CreateChargeParameterDiscoveryResDC_ISO
title: SCC_CreateChargeParameterDiscoveryResDC_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateChargeParameterDiscoveryResDC_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[], long EVSEProcessing, float CurrentAndVoltageLimits[], float PeakCurrentRipple)
description: Creates a Charge Parameter Discovery Response message for sending, using the DC syntax.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.

parameters.name: NotificationMaxDelay
parameters.description: Time until the vehicle is expected to react on the notification (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: StatusCode
parameters.description: Internal state of the EVSE (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: Notification
parameters.description: Notification about an action that the charge point wants the vehicle to perform (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: EVSEProcessing
parameters.description: 0 if Finished 1 if Ongoing 2 if Ongoing_WaitingForCustomerInteraction (ISO 15118)

parameters.name: CurrentAndVoltageLimits
parameters.description: Electrical limit values: CurrentAndVoltageLimits[0] = EVSEMaximumCurrentLimit CurrentAndVoltageLimits[1] = EVSEMaximumVoltageLimit CurrentAndVoltageLimits[2] = EVSEMinimumCurrentLimit CurrentAndVoltageLimits[3] = EVSEMinimumVoltageLimit Only for ISO 15118 CurrentAndVoltageLimits[4] = EVSEMaximumPowerLimit

parameters.name: PeakCurrentRipple
parameters.description: Peak-to-peak magnitude of the current ripple.
CurrentRegulation- Tolerance float Absolute magnitude of the regulation tolerance.
EnergyToBeDelivered float Amount of energy to be delivered in Wh.
SAScheduleList long Schedule / tariff list from secondary actor.
EVSEIsolationStatus char[] Indicates the isolation condition.

return:
Time until the vehicle is expected to react 
on the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
